name: Josh Riley
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $882,674 for Josh Riley in U.S. House, NY-19. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
